message:
feat(ci): harden evidence bundle, certification gate, and release readiness validators

Evidence bundle (ci_evidence_bundle.rs):
- Promote health_delta and journey_reports from optional to required
  artifact sources — complete certification verdicts need full
  diagnostic coverage, not partial snapshots
- Flatten nested match→if-let in collect_section for readability
  (no logic change, same error paths)
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] to collect_section
- Add test full_cert_diagnostics_are_required_for_complete_verdict
  that asserts health_delta and journey_reports are required

Full suite gate (ci_full_suite_gate.rs):
- Extract write_non_empty_artifact() helper that fail-closes on empty
  or zero-byte artifact payloads — prevents silent certification
  report corruption
- Wire certification_report.md emission through the new helper
- Add downstream consumer tokens to run_all_wires expectation list
- Add tests: write_non_empty_artifact_rejects_empty_payload and
  write_non_empty_artifact_fails_when_write_path_is_not_a_file

Release readiness (release_readiness.rs):
- Add must-pass gate metadata validation (schema, generated_at,
  run_id, correlation_id, observed fields) — legacy payloads without
  the v1 schema now fail the release readiness check
- Evidence bundle gate now requires verdict=="complete" in addition
  to total_artifacts>0
- Apply rustfmt to assert chain formatting
- Add tests: validate_must_pass_gate_metadata_accepts_current_schema
  and validate_must_pass_gate_metadata_rejects_legacy_payload

Ext conformance (ext_conformance_generated.rs):
- Remove unnecessary .clone() on generated_at (clippy fix)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2286,7 +2286,7 @@ fn conformance_must_pass_gate() {
 
     let verdict = MustPassGateVerdict {
         schema: "pi.ext.must_pass_gate.v1".to_string(),
-        generated_at: generated_at.clone(),
+        generated_at,
         run_id: run_id.clone(),
         correlation_id: correlation_id.clone(),
         mode: mode.clone(),
